languages.text: {n}Во взгляде Эоганна читается некоторая тоска по времени, проведенному на станции.{/n}
{n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Во взгляде Эоганна читается некоторая тоска по времени, проведенному на станции.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}
{n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}
{n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Percibes cierta añoranza en la mirada de Eogunn; nostalgia por el tiempo que pasó en la estación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Percibes cierta añoranza en la mirada de Eogunn; nostalgia por el tiempo que pasó en la estación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你从伊奥贡的目光中察觉到一丝眷恋。他在怀念在那座星站上度过的时光。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你从伊奥贡的目光中察觉到一丝眷恋。他在怀念在那座星站上度过的时光。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez une pointe de regret dans le regard d'Eogunn : une certaine nostalgie de son temps à bord de la station.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous remarquez une pointe de regret dans le regard d'Eogunn : une certaine nostalgie de son temps à bord de la station.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du erkennst eine gewisse Nostalgie in Eogunns Blick — Sehnsucht nach seiner Zeit auf der Station.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du erkennst eine gewisse Nostalgie in Eogunns Blick — Sehnsucht nach seiner Zeit auf der Station.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンの視線には、ステーションで過ごした時間への郷愁が感じられる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You detect a certain longing in Eogunn's gaze — nostalgia for his time spent on the station.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un bakışlarında belirli bir özlem görüyorsun. İstasyonda geçirdiği vakte nostaljiyle bakıyor.{/n}
